title: Building Maintenance Technician #76501
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: FMCG Wholesaler
  • Position Title: Facility Technician (M&E)
  • Working Location: West – Tuas South (Nearest MRT: Tuas Link)
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Mon-Fri: 7.45am-4.45pm)
  • Salary Package: Basic Up to SGD 3500 + AWS + Performance Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct regular inspections, preventative maintenance, and repairs on essential building systems such as HVAC, electrical, plumbing, and lighting
  • Quickly address maintenance concerns to reduce downtime and ensure safety
  • Operate and monitor the building management systems (BMS) to confirm that mechanical and electrical systems are functioning correctly
  • Regularly inspect equipment, such as forklifts and VNAs, report any irregularities, and arrange for necessary repairs or replacements
  • Adhere to safety regulations and building codes
  • Keep detailed records of all maintenance work and repairs
  • Perform routine safety audits and emergency response drills
  • Support the overall maintenance of the facility, including tasks like painting, carpentry, and small-scale construction projects
  • Liaise with external contractors for specialized repairs or installations when required
  • Handle emergency maintenance calls promptly
  • Manage an inventory of maintenance tools, parts, and supplies
  • Procure and store essential replacement parts as required
  • Maintain comprehensive records of all maintenance activities, equipment logs, and repairs conducted
  • Generate reports detailing the condition of the facility and maintenance activities undertaken

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Min. ITE in Engineering, preferably Electrical/Mechanical
  • Min. 3 year of experience in related field, having experience in lift maintenance is a plus
  • Skilled in operating and troubleshooting electrical systems
  • Comfortable working outdoors which may involve exposure to various weather conditions
  • Periodic maintenance duties at the headquarters may be required
  • Must have Class 3 driving license for vehicle testing

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #76501 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
